creator: milios@ccsys.com
text:
Created attachment 224256
svn diff from /usr/ports/net-p2p/namecoin

This updates the port of namecoin (explicitly) and slave ports namecoin-daemon and namecoin-utils (implicitly).

Sorry I'm still using Subversion diff format. Luckily a gerbil could apply this absolutely minimal modification.

Tested yet only on FreeBSD-11.4-RELEASE-p9/amd64. Please share feedback if you use a different platform.
